requirement_topic.en: EMC — EAEU TR CU 020/2011, IEC 61000 Evidence, and Armenia Grid Installation Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——EAEU TR CU 020/2011、IEC 61000证据及亚美尼亚电网安装条件
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——EAEU TR CU 020/2011、IEC 61000證據及亞美尼亞電網安裝條件

summary.en: Because Armenia is an EAEU member, PV inverters and related electronic power-conversion equipment supplied into Armenia may fall within TR CU 020/2011 on electromagnetic compatibility when in scope. EAC conformity is therefore a genuine Armenia pathway for in-scope products, alongside Armenia SARM standards practice and project-level PSRC / ENA requirements. The technical file should address emissions, immunity, harmonic current, installation conditions, cable routing, filters, grounding, operating modes, and any grid-code firmware configuration. IEC 61000-series test evidence can support the EMC file, but the conformity route, applicant, language documents, and model coverage must be confirmed for Armenia/EAEU use.
summary.zh: 由于亚美尼亚是EAEU成员，供应至亚美尼亚的光伏逆变器及相关电子功率变换设备在落入范围时可能适用TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容技术法规。因此，对于落入范围的产品，EAC符合性是亚美尼亚真实适用的路径，并与亚美尼亚SARM标准实践及项目层面的PSRC / ENA要求并行。技术文件应覆盖发射、抗扰度、谐波电流、安装条件、电缆敷设、滤波器、接地、运行模式及任何电网规范固件配置。IEC 61000系列测试证据可支持EMC文件，但符合性路径、申请人、语言文件和型号覆盖必须针对亚美尼亚/EAEU用途确认。
summary.zht: 由於亞美尼亞是EAEU成員，供應至亞美尼亞的光伏逆變器及相關電子功率轉換設備在落入範圍時可能適用TR CU 020/2011電磁相容技術法規。因此，對於落入範圍的產品，EAC符合性是亞美尼亞真實適用的路徑，並與亞美尼亞SARM標準實務及項目層面的PSRC / ENA要求並行。技術文件應覆蓋發射、抗擾度、諧波電流、安裝條件、電纜敷設、濾波器、接地、運行模式及任何電網規範韌體配置。IEC 61000系列測試證據可支持EMC文件，但符合性路徑、申請人、語言文件和型號覆蓋必須針對亞美尼亞/EAEU用途確認。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU EAC conformity marking for products within applicable technical-regulation scope
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods, emissions, immunity, and harmonic-current evidence
SARM adoption or recognition of Armenian, IEC, and GOST-family standards where applicable

summary.en: China-side packages commonly include GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, GB/T 19964-2024, and EMC reports prepared for Chinese certification, CNAS testing, IEC/CISPR export projects, or purchaser audits. Those reports may be useful inputs, but Chinese EMC evidence is not an automatic TR CU 020/2011 declaration or certificate for Armenia and does not by itself authorize EAC marking.
summary.zh: 中国侧资料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024，以及为中国认证、CNAS测试、IEC/CISPR出口项目或采购方审核准备的EMC报告。这些报告可作为有用输入，但中国EMC证据不会自动成为亚美尼亚TR CU 020/2011声明或证书，也不能单独授权使用EAC标志。
summary.zht: 中國側資料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024，以及為中國認證、CNAS測試、IEC/CISPR出口項目或採購方審核準備的EMC報告。這些報告可作為有用輸入，但中國EMC證據不會自動成為亞美尼亞TR CU 020/2011聲明或證書，也不能單獨授權使用EAC標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: exporters must map the exact inverter model, firmware, filters, accessories, manuals, and intended Armenia installation conditions to TR CU 020/2011 and any standards named by the EAEU conformity body or SARM/project reviewer. IEC 61000 reports from another market may need a delta review or retesting, especially where harmonic performance depends on voltage, grid impedance, or operating mode.
gap.zh: 差距：出口商必须将具体逆变器型号、固件、滤波器、附件、说明书及预期亚美尼亚安装条件映射至TR CU 020/2011，以及EAEU符合性机构或SARM/项目审查方指定的任何标准。来自其他市场的IEC 61000报告可能需要差异审查或重新测试，尤其是谐波性能受电压、电网阻抗或运行模式影响时。
gap.zht: 差距：出口商必須將具體逆變器型號、韌體、濾波器、附件、說明書及預期亞美尼亞安裝條件映射至TR CU 020/2011，以及EAEU符合性機構或SARM/項目審查方指定的任何標準。來自其他市場的IEC 61000報告可能需要差異審查或重新測試，尤其是諧波性能受電壓、電網阻抗或運行模式影響時。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter or related equipment is within TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope; project-level IEC 61000 evidence may also be required by ENA, SARM, lender, tender, or owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC testing is domestic or purchaser-specific evidence and is not equivalent to Armenia/EAEU EMC conformity

source.publisher: National Body for Standards and Metrology of the Republic of Armenia (SARM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Armenia is an EAEU member, so TR CU 020/2011 and EAC marking can apply to in-scope inverter EMC. Treat China GB/T or IEC/CISPR EMC reports as input evidence only until a qualified EAEU conformity route, model coverage, language file, and Armenia project requirements are confirmed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚是EAEU成员，因此TR CU 020/2011和EAC标志可适用于落入范围的逆变器EMC。在确认合格EAEU符合性路径、型号覆盖、语言文件和亚美尼亚项目要求前，应仅将中国GB/T或IEC/CISPR EMC报告视为输入证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞是EAEU成員，因此TR CU 020/2011和EAC標誌可適用於落入範圍的逆變器EMC。在確認合格EAEU符合性路徑、型號覆蓋、語言文件和亞美尼亞項目要求前，應僅將中國GB/T或IEC/CISPR EMC報告視為輸入證據。
